name: Sunfall
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG, {Poison}, and {Counter} are increased by [StateArg1]%. Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG are increased by [StateArg2]%.
lore:
A.F. 314, on a deep winter night, the sound of an explosion echoed through the Yakutsk Forests.
The earth trembled, and the woods were illuminated as if it were midday. Accompanied by the shrieks of life and the wails of nature, the village was razed to the ground.
According to Dexter, a pre-college student majoring in Awakener Studies who participated in the investigation, among the flames shooting into the sky that night, colors of black and silver shone brightly.
